command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT 
  o.orderNumber,
  o.customerName,
  o.customerPhone,
  o.totalAmount / 100 as totalRupees,
  o.paymentStatus,
  o.paymentMethod,
  o.razorpayPaymentId,
  o.orderStatus,
  o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE o.customerPhone IN (
  '+917548801774', '7548801774', '917548801774',
  '+917200986798', '7200986798', '917200986798',
  '+919790739055', '9790739055', '919790739055',
  '+919840060104', '9840060104', '919840060104',
  '+919962269835', '9962269835', '919962269835',
  '+919344558375', '9344558375', '919344558375',
  '+919962956156', '9962956156', '919962956156',
  '+919884461641', '9884461641', '919884461641',
  '+919884040352', '9884040352', '919884040352'
)
AND o.createdAt >= '2026-03-01'
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC
